title: Wood Farming Sounds
description: Replaces all crop breaking sounds with the wood breaking sound. Made to be easy on the ears in Hypixel Skyblock farming.
body:
Wood Farming Sounds replaces all crop breaking sounds in Hypixel Skyblock with the wood breaking sound.

This is the same sound heard when breaking pumpkin, melon and cocoa bean blocks.
Works with other packs that have a custom wood breaking sound.
